name: Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and 1/3 cup sugar until light and fluffy. Blend in the egg.
2. Add the flour and mix well. Spread the dough evenly on the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 5 minutes. Remove from the oven and lower the temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the cream cheese and 3/4 cup sugar. Beat until smooth. Add the mashed pumpkin, spices (cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg), and salt to taste. Mix well.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
6. Pour the mixture into the baked crust.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes.
8. Loosen the cake from the sides of the pan. Remove the rim of the pan and let it chill in the refrigerator.
9. Garnish with whipped cream before serving.
